arts.ttl: Sunday's Ligue 1 predictions including Lyon vs. Marseille
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Ligue 1 fixtures, including Lyon vs. Marseille.

arts.ttl: Rayan Cherki could face Marseille after agreeing contract extension with Lyon
arts.sum: According to a report by RMC Sport, Rayan Cherki (21) has agreed a contract extension with Olympique Lyonnais. The France u21 star who featured under Thierry Henry at the Olympics…

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Mason Greenwood 'scouted' amid three-club battle
arts.sum: Barcelona, Atletico Madrid and Bayern Munich reportedly all send scouts to watch Marseille's Mason Greenwood amid his fast start to life in Ligue 1.

arts.ttl: Man Utd set for Mason Greenwood transfer windfall as European trio register interest
arts.sum: Mason Greenwood's start to life at Marseille has attracted interest from a trio of European giants and a transfer move would bring a welcome boost to Manchester United's finances

arts.ttl: Adrien Rabiot aiming to be fully fit for Marseille’s clash with PSG
arts.sum: Adrien Rabiot (29) will be unlikely to feature in Olympique de Marseille’s clash with Olympique Lyonnais on Sunday evening. The France international who left Juventus at the start of July…

arts.ttl: Roberto De Zerbi: ‘Lyon are a competitor to Marseille’
arts.sum: On Sunday evening, Olympique de Marseille will travel to the Groupama Stadium to face Olympique Lyonnais for one of the biggest clashes in the French calendar. More than bragging rights…
